title: rubus × umbraculorum
intro: Rubus × umbraculorum, also known as the Blackberry Thorn, is a hybrid plant that combines the characteristics of the blackberry and raspberry species, producing edible black fruits and thorny canes. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which may help to soothe digestive issues and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × umbraculorum include supporting cardiovascular health, reducing the risk of certain cancers, and providing essential vitamins and minerals. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and jams, which can be used to harness its medicinal and nutritional properties.
